svg.title: Emergency Ingress To Output Signal Flow

g.text: Emergency Ingress To Output Signal Flow
(TEST_SCN / Input_Console -> V2X -> ADAS -> CGW -> IVI / CLU)
- emergencyContext can override base alert type
derive warningBeep / road flow / motion step
as warning text / beep / render state
1. External or manual emergency ingress arrives
2. V2X normalizes type / direction / eta / source
3. ADAS converts ingress into alert decision
4. CGW gates decision into effective output
5. IVI / CLU render emergency warning to the driver
